title: Human-robot interaction methodology: Robot teaching activity
author: Velentza, Fachantidis, et al.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: HRI studies and the use of social robots in the role of a tutor is relatively new and thus, the source of theories to conduct and evaluate experimental conditions and data will be built in the field of Psychology, Social and Learning studies, but also on Neuroscientist findings.
